title: Knysna Council placed under administration
description: KNYSNA NEWS - The Western Cape Government...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - The Western Cape Government has decided to place the Knysna Council under administration.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - The Western Cape Government has decided to place the Knysna Council under administration."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"After “careful consideration of all available evidence”, the Provincial Cabinet resolved today, 12 September, to dissolve the Council and appoint an administrator, according to a statement released after a WC Cabinet meeting."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The administrator will assume all executive and legislative authority, with the support of the Provincial Government, until a newly elected municipal council is elected.","html":"The administrator will assume all executive and legislative authority, with the support of the Provincial Government, until a newly elected municipal council is elected."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The statement said this can be seen as “a decisive intervention mechanism designed to address exceptional circumstances where a municipality has failed to fulfill its executive obligations, thereby enabling a comprehensive turnaround and trajectory correction.”","html":"The statement said this can be seen as “a decisive intervention mechanism designed to address exceptional circumstances where a municipality has failed to fulfill its executive obligations, thereby enabling a comprehensive turnaround and trajectory correction.”"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Read more on sister publication, Knysna-Plett Herald"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
